title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access their account. The issue may be related to incorrect credentials, account lockout, or a possible system error. Further investigation is required to resolve the problem and restore access.

title: Payment Failed but Amount Deducted
description: Customer reports that payment failed during checkout but the amount was deducted from their bank account. The transaction needs to be verified and refunded if necessary.

title: Unable to Update Profile Information
description: User is unable to update their profile details such as name and phone number. The save button appears unresponsive. This might be a frontend or API issue.

title: Email Notifications Not Received
description: Customer is not receiving any email notifications including password reset and order confirmations. Possible issue with email service or spam filtering.

title: Website Loading Very Slow
description: User reports that the website is loading very slowly, especially on the dashboard page. This may be due to server performance or large assets.

title: Error 500 on Checkout Page
description: Customer encounters a 500 Internal Server Error when trying to complete the checkout process. Needs urgent backend investigation.

title: Search Function Not Working Properly
description: Search results are not accurate and sometimes return empty results even for valid queries. Likely an issue with search indexing.

title: App Crashes on Startup
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after launch for some users. Could be related to a recent update or compatibility issue.

title: Incorrect Order Details Displayed
description: Users are seeing incorrect order details in their order history. This may be a data mismatch or caching issue.

title: Password Reset Link Expired Too Quickly
description: Customers report that password reset links expire within a few minutes, making it difficult to reset passwords. Needs configuration check.
